pi_items.source: Verified via `setup_opentoonz.sh` downloading the master zip from `github.com/opentoonz/opentoonz_sample` where the file `dwanko_run.tnz` exists.
Verified via the task description and `export_result.sh` targeting this directory.
Verified via the task description ('Render the first 12 frames'), `verifier.py` passing condition, and OpenToonz project properties containing 72 frames.
Verified via the task prompt ('Neon Cyan (RGB: 0, 255, 255)') and `verifier.py` array mapping logic.
Verified via the task prompt ('Dark Blue (RGB: 0, 0, 50)') and `verifier.py` array mapping logic.
Verified via `verifier.py` using this exact value to evaluate color euclidean distances.

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on the real OpenToonz sample file 'dwanko_run.tnz' downloaded from the official GitHub repository. The required output directory is '/home/ga/OpenToonz/output/blueprint'. The agent must generate a minimum of 12 PNG frames (the source project has 72 frames), recoloring the line art to Neon Cyan (RGB: [0, 255, 255]) and changing the background to Dark Blue (RGB: [0, 0, 50]). The verifier uses a color tolerance distance of 30 to score the recoloring.
